message:
🐛 Fix installer/solution fetch and filter non-mission files (#1520)

- Installer fetch: read flat JSON files from cncf-install/ instead of
  looking for subdirectories with mission.json (matches actual KB structure)
- Filter .gitkeep, README.md and other non-JSON files from directory listings
  in the sidebar file browser

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
